characters.name: Charlotte Monroe
characters.description: Charlotte Monroeis captain of theMemphis Christian Cyclonesand a flyer. Charlotte is also the daughter of Parker Monroe and Layne Monroe, and the young sister ofSavannah Monroe. Charlotte is portrayed; byEmma Lahana. Charlotte is seen to be perky and petite, like her sister,Savannah Monroe, she is also competitive and confident.

characters.name: Darwin
characters.description: Darwinis a male base on the Hellcats cheerleading squad. He is described as a hunky asian and openly gay.

characters.name: Derrick Altman
characters.description: Derrick Altman was the sports doctor for the Hellcats andVanessa Lodge's boyfriend, then fiance, before the two broke up. He is played byD. B. Woodside. [1] A World Full of Strangers: Hellcats Sports Doctor Derrick sidelines team flyer Alice when she gets injured during practice. He's a fan ofRed Raymond, the new coach at Lancer.

characters.name: Jake Harrow
characters.description: Jake Harrow appears to be a charming, yet dangerous southern player. He's spoiled with a very huge ego. He has a brooding rivalry with former Football player-turned-cheerleaderLewis Flynn. He is played by actor Ryan Kennedy. Beale St. After Dark: Alice goes to Lion's quarterback Jake for drugs to speed up her recovery so she can get her sport back on the squad. While some of the squad is accompanyingSavannahon her date withDan, Lewis sees the exchange. A fight breaks out andLewis, Dan and Jake get arrested. However the sheriff is a Lancer football fan, and calls CoachRedto get Jake. Ragged Old Flag: Jake is coaching the girls volleyball team for a game of flag football against the Hellcats. His girlfriendAliceseduces him then while he was asleep took photos of his game plans. He sees her but doesn't call her out on it until after the Hellcats have won without cheating. Jake Harrow appears to be a charming, yet dangerous southern player. He's spoiled with a very huge ego. He has a brooding rivalry with former Football player-turned-cheerleaderLewis Flynn. He is played by actor Ryan Kennedy.

characters.name: James Patch
characters.description: James PatchisDan Patch's father in the hit tv series Hellcats.

characters.name: Lewis Flynn
characters.description: Lewis Robert Flynnis a student at Lancer University. He was formerly a member of Lancer's football team but is now a base on the Hellcats cheerleading squad. He is portrayed by Robbie Jones. Lewis is one of the Hellcats' bases and is an easy-going guy who has a love for action. He was once a star on the Lancer football team but quit when he discovered a scandal of players being paid by the college. He tried out for the Hellcats team when his then-girlfriend Alice encouraged him to do so in order to gain scholarship money after the football scandal, and instantly became hooked. Lewis was born and raised in Nashville, Tennessee. Lewis is one of the Hellcats' bases and is an easy-going guy who has a love for action. He was once a star on the Lancer football team but quit when he discovered a scandal of players being paid by the college. He tried out for the Hellcats team when his then-girlfriend Alice encouraged him to do so in order to gain scholarship money after the football scandal, and instantly became hooked.

characters.name: Marti Perkins (character)
characters.description: Marti Perkins Marti Perkinsis a student at Lancer University. Marti studies pre-law at Lancer University while simultaneously being the newest addition on the Hellcats cheerleading squad. She is the flyer ofLewis Flynn. Marti Perkins is portrayed by Aly Michalka. A World Full of StrangersMarti Perkins is the daughter ofWanda Perkins, and a pre-law student at Lancer University.  Her party girl mother is a bartender at the university pub, affording her a scholarship to attend Lancer. However when the administrative department cuts scholarships for Lancer employees and families, Marti has to find a way to stay in school. She meetsSavannah Monroe, captain of the university cheerleading squad and learns that the program has scholarship benefits. She auditions for a position on the team, and joins the Hellcats. Marti's position on the squad is as a result of a cheerleader,Alice Verdura, getting injured. They don't get along. Marti and Savannah become fast friends, as does she and Hellcats base, Lewis Flynn. Marti is a townie from Memphis, Tennessee, who is described as "wicked smart." She is a pre-law student at Lancer University who will go to extended measures to stay in school. She is often perceived as ”witty“ or ”sarcastic“ and is very protective over her friends and family.

characters.name: Marti Perkins (student)
characters.description: Marti Perkinsis a main characters inHellcatsand a flyer for the Hellcats cheerleading squad. Marti is the daughter of townie and party girl,Wanda Perkins. Due to her mother being irresponsible and a drunk, Marti learned to watch out for herself and take care of her and her mother. Before the series started, Marti took gymnastics and was very good at it. She is also a fast learner since her cheering came from watching Bring it On, a movie based on cheerleading. During on of her competitions, Wanda and one of her boyfriends showed up drunk and publicly embarrassed her and Marti quit. Marti is street and book smart. She's described as wicked smart and responsible. She is also sarcastic.
characters.personality_section: Marti is street and book smart. She's described as wicked smart and responsible. She is also sarcastic.

characters.name: Morgan Pepper
characters.description: Morgan Pepper is a nerdy, yet, likeable pre-law student in Julian's class. He appears to be Marti's academic rival. Morgan Pepper is a nerdy, yet, likeable pre-law student in Julian's class. He appears to be Marti's academic rival.

characters.name: Red Raymond
characters.description: Red Raymond is the returning Head Football Coach atLancer University. He was forced to resign ten year prior for having an affair with a student. A World Full of Strangers:Hellcats Coach Vanessa, is told byBilly Marsh, head of Lancer's Athletics Department that he is cutting the Hellcats budget in order to hire a new head football coach. Vanessa and the new coach have history. I Say a Little Prayer:The Hellcats compete at qualifiers and Red brings the Lions to cheer for them, to get under Vanessa's skin.

characters.name: Savannah Monroe
characters.description: Savannah Elizabeth Monroeis a flyer, a student ofLancer Universityand the former captain of theMemphis Christian Cyclones. Savannah is also the daughter of Parker Monroe and Layne Monroe, and the older sister ofCharlotte Monroe. Savannah is portrayed; byAshley Tisdale. Savannah is a neat freak; with a very chipper and positive attitude. She has a penchant for writing inspirational mnemonics on her teammates arms. She is a christian faithful and she strongly believes in the importance of family. She can be really emotional; but also optimistic person and loves to help her friends.

characters.name: Vanessa Lodge
characters.description: Vanessa Lodge is a former Hellcat cheerleader who is now the team's coach.  She is passionate and determined to make the Hellcats the winners they used to be. Her job is threatened if the Hellcats do not place at the National competition. She's portrayed by Sharon Leal. She's smart, careful and she loves Hellcats like her family. Vanessa was a former Hellcat cheerleader. It is also revealed that during this time she had an affair with the then coach:Red Raymond. This affair was then discovered. When it was discovered Red was forced to resign in order to keep the whole ordeal quiet, in order to not slander the University. She's smart, careful and she loves Hellcats like her family.
characters.personality_section: She's smart, careful and she loves Hellcats like her family.

characters.name: Wanda Perkins
characters.description: Rex Perkins(ex-husband) Wanda Perkinsis the often irresponsible mother ofMarti. She cares more about being a best-friend to Marti than a mother sometimes which can cause a strain in their relationship. All the while, Marti also has to deal with her financially unstable and sometimes irresponsible mother, Wanda Perkins, whom she often has to bail out of difficult situations, and her best friend Dan Patch.
